description: ACCUM 10→20: fewer updates hurt more than cleaner grads help
WD 0.1→0.05: no change (val identical to baseline)
SEQ 256→128: 1.6x more steps, slight val improvement
SEQ 128→64: too short, val degrades despite 5650 steps
ADAM_B2 0.95→0.99: variance too slow for short training
LR 4e-4→3.5e-4: marginally worse, 4e-4 is sweet spot
